title: Mid-term Exam Schedule Released
message: The mid-term examination schedule for all departments is now available on the portal.

title: Library Extended Hours
message: Central library will remain open until 11 PM during exam week.

title: Campus Wi-Fi Maintenance
message: Scheduled maintenance on June 24 from 2 AM to 4 AM. Brief interruptions expected.

title: Scholarship Applications Open
message: Merit-based scholarships for the 2026-27 academic year. Apply before July 15.
